mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.apply_id AS applyId, o.visit_id AS visitId, o.opportunity_code AS code, a.visitor_company AS customer, o.status, o.status AS stage, '-' AS amount, COALESCE(o.update_time, o.create_time) AS lastFollow, o.remark FROM eh_opportunity o LEFT JOIN eh_apply a ON a.id = o.apply_id AND a.del_flag = '0' WHERE o.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY COALESCE(o.update_time, o.create_time) DESC
